title: EutrophicationCMLElementResult
description: EutrophicationCMLElementResult: Result class for resulting Eutrophication (EN 15804+A1) for a particular Element.

A1.description: Resulting Eutrophication (EN 15804+A1) relating to the Raw Material Supply module in the Product stage. Property has a quantity of type EutrophicationCML measured in [kg [PO₄]³⁻ eq].

A2.description: Resulting Eutrophication (EN 15804+A1) relating to the Transport module in the Product stage. Property has a quantity of type EutrophicationCML measured in [kg [PO₄]³⁻ eq].

A3.description: Resulting Eutrophication (EN 15804+A1) relating to the Manufacturing module in the Product stage. Property has a quantity of type EutrophicationCML measured in [kg [PO₄]³⁻ eq].

A1toA3.description: Resulting Eutrophication (EN 15804+A1) relating to the full Product stage. Property has a quantity of type EutrophicationCML measured in [kg [PO₄]³⁻ eq].

A4.description: Resulting Eutrophication (EN 15804+A1) relating to the Transport module in the Construction Process stage. Property has a quantity of type EutrophicationCML measured in [kg [PO₄]³⁻ eq].

A5.description: Resulting Eutrophication (EN 15804+A1) relating to the Construction Installation Process module in the Construction Process stage. Property has a quantity of type EutrophicationCML measured in [kg [PO₄]³⁻ eq].

B5.description: Resulting Eutrophication (EN 15804+A1) relating to the Refurbishment module in the Use stage. Property has a quantity of type EutrophicationCML measured in [kg [PO₄]³⁻ eq].

B6.description: Resulting Eutrophication (EN 15804+A1) relating to the Operational Energy Use module in the Use stage. Property has a quantity of type EutrophicationCML measured in [kg [PO₄]³⁻ eq].

B7.description: Resulting Eutrophication (EN 15804+A1) relating to the Operational Water Use module in the Use stage. Property has a quantity of type EutrophicationCML measured in [kg [PO₄]³⁻ eq].
